name: Lecture Clean
tagline: Dual-theme teaching deck with clean white and terminal dark modes; mermaid diagrams, progressive reveals, toggle cards.

palette.description: Two full themes: clean white (light) and terminal green-on-black (dark). Toggle via data-theme attribute. Single blue accent in clean mode, green accent in terminal mode.

typography.style: modern grotesque display + clean sans body + coding mono; full Chinese support

best_for: Tech talks, workshops, methodology shares, code walkthroughs — anything that wants to feel precise, modern, teaching-forward. The terminal theme is great for code-heavy sections; the clean theme for concepts and frameworks. Built-in mermaid diagram support makes it ideal for architecture and flow presentations.
avoid_for: Contexts that need to feel warm, handcrafted, or emotionally expressive — the geometric precision and monospace chrome commit to a rational, systems voice.
